items.title: Fix checker for Python 3.9 compatibility in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: The checker CronJob was crashing due to incompatible type annotations in check.py, specifically using str | None instead of Optional[str]. This fix ensures compatibility with Python 3.9, allowing the checker to run and sync new models like gpt-5.4 to MongoDB. As a result, API requests for gpt-5.4 will no longer fail with a 500 error.
